mapper.update: UPDATE TF_CALENDAR_EVENT SET NAME = #{name}, START_DATE = #{startDate}, END_DATE = #{endDate}, TYPE = #{type}, UPDATED_AT = SYSDATE WHERE ID = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM TF_CALENDAR_EVENT WHERE USER_ID = #{userId} AND START_DATE BETWEEN TRUNC(SYSDATE, 'IW') AND TRUNC(SYSDATE, 'IW') + 7
